## Python .gitignore general template

## Compiled bytecode files
__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*$py.class

## Build artifacts
dist/
build/
*.egg-info/
*.egg
*.whl

## IMPORTANT # Local Virtual Environments files
venv/
env/
.venv/
.env/

## IMPORTANT # Local Virtual Environments, keys, passwords, credentials
## MAJOR SECURITY RISK __NEVER__ COMMIT THESE FILES
.env
*.env

## Local IDE configs and editor settings
.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo
*~

## Operating System automatically generated junk files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
desktop.ini

## Jupyter Notebook checkpoint files (actual .ipynb files are tracked)
.ipynb_checkpoints/

## Testing / Coverage generated reports
.pytest_cache/
.coverage
htmlcov/
*.cover

## Logs, runtime output
*.log

## Data files, uncomment files types below to include in .gitignore
# *.csv
# *.xlsx
# *.json
# *.db
# *.sqlite3
# data/
